title: Digital Stamps Scheme Manual for Importers and Local Manufacturers
summary: Provides digital-stamp compliance procedures for importers and local manufacturers, supporting electronic traceability, tracking and tax administration for excisable goods.

theme_notes.digital_economy.einvoicing_digital_tax: Manual for digital-stamp traceability in excise administration.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Excise Tax Law and Decision No. 31 of 2022
